reviews.comment:
La única vez que pase había caca en el piso y todo el inodoro manchado.. la atención pésima y el full a las 10:30 cerrado.. tube que viajar al full de general roca donde pude pasar al baño y desayunar como se debe.. fea experiencia..

(Translated by Google)
The only time I went there was poop on the floor and the toilet was stained... the service was terrible and the bathroom was closed at 10:30... I had to travel to the bathroom on General Roca where I could use the bathroom and have a proper breakfast... a bad experience...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCd28yRW5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cuando compren comida para llevar, controlar la compra ya que después no hay reclamos... pagué una hamburguesa completa..1250$..con tomate, lechuga, cebolla.. y solo venía la carne y el pan.

(Translated by Google)
When buying takeout, check your order carefully because there are no complaints later... I paid $1250 for a complete hamburger... with tomato, lettuce, onion... and it only contained the meat and the bun.
